name: Lattice
description: Transform employee performance, engagement, and development with Lattice - the performance management system for today's digital world. Learn more about Lattice

reviews.review_title: Great features and easy to use
reviews.review_description: I have used Lattice for goals, 1:1 updates, PTO requests, viewing the organization chart, and completing various company surveys. I find all these tasks to be easy to do within Lattice.
reviews.review_pros: Lattice is easy to learn and provides a lot of features for our company. The ability to find features and information is also easy with the home page and left-hand navigation bar.
reviews.review_cons: The tool is laid out very well. The biggest compaint about it that I have is understanding how to set up goals. There is a SMART goals section and a grow section. For setting up personal goals, the right selection is "grow", but I often forget and select SMART goals which are more department or company-wide things in my experience with the tools.

reviews.review_description: It is good, based on user experience, value for money, integration with HRIS, navigating through new appraisal documents.
reviews.review_pros: Easy to navigate, UI, then user friendly for 1:1's agenda to update and keep track. Retain all appraisal docs. in one platform.
reviews.review_cons: When someone resigns as a manager then HR has to export records as we cannot update record to move files within the accounts.

reviews.review_title: Quick and Easy HR software product but lack innovation
reviews.review_description: I was both a user and an administrator of the product
reviews.review_pros: It is a tool that integrates with tools like Slack/JIRA/Workday to provide HR software/management
reviews.review_cons: It's module is very templated and structured. Doesn't feel like there's a lot of innovation behind it.

reviews.review_description: Use of the software has improved engagement in our organisation has enabled us to simplify processes and ensure data driven decisions.
reviews.review_pros: The software has very reliable analytics and reporting features. Availability of customizable templates which makes standoutamongst other similar tools Ease of use and availability of real-time vendor support services.
reviews.review_cons: Everything about the software is good from customer services to userbility and intuitiveness. I have nothing against the tool.

reviews.review_title: A great tool for people management
reviews.review_description: It has been a great experience having an easy to use platform that help drive employee engagement, better internal communication, and is an excellent at helping managers oversee their teams.
reviews.review_pros: Lattice has been a great tool to help manage the team, have effective communication as a group, and individually, conduct performance reviews, and give the team a greater sense that the company truly cares about their development as employees.
reviews.review_cons: I think the thing that is most challenging about Lattice is that many of the feature are great, but the pricing for them outweighs the potential benefit given the size of our organization.

reviews.review_title: An easy HR tool for Feedback and Reviews with some tweaks in OKRs
reviews.review_pros: Lattice is easy to use. it has small simple menu on the sidebar comprising of 1:1 & feedback, Growth and OKRs and performance reviews
reviews.review_cons: If you go inside especially in OKRs, it gets a bit difficult to work in different sections and subsections and i would prefer to be able to move them around to stack them under big objectives.

reviews.review_pros: The ability to centrally manage all of our review cycles and put out employee surveys quite quickly with minimum admin. The platform is very intuitive, making it easy for both managers and employees to engage with the process. I also like the clear visibility into performance trends, which helps drive better conversations. The integrations with other tools save time, and the customization options mean we can tailor surveys and reviews to our exact needs
reviews.review_cons: Some areas can feel a little overwhelming at first, as there are many features to get familiar with. The reporting dashboards could be more flexible with customisation options, and occasionally navigation feels a bit clunky when switching between modules. It also takes time to fully configure everything to match our processes, so there’s a bit of a learning curve before you get the most value out of it.

reviews.review_title: Great for a growing smaller company
reviews.review_description: Thus far, our company has enjoyed the features that bring goals and career planning into the limelight.
reviews.review_pros: Easy and intuitive user interface. Simple to train on, provides good generic building blocks for core functions.
reviews.review_cons: The integrations / APIs can be a little more difficult to manage if you are not in a standard configuration from your core systems.

reviews.review_title: Best performance management tool on the market
reviews.review_description: Lattice has been the premier performance management tool that we have used as a company. They are continuously rolling out new features, have prioritized AI functionality, and have a really great customer support team to help us with all of our questions along the way.
reviews.review_pros: The customization of question templates and review cycles has been such a pro. We've appreciated the ability to customize permission profiles. The user experience and interface are really easy to follow, and their recent AI phone functionality for review writing and search bar questions is a big time-saver.
reviews.review_cons: We integrate Lattice with Rippling (our HRIS), and there are some limitations with custom fields for demographic data that will sync between the two systems. Additionally, Lattice doesn't have automated reminders for manual review cycles.

reviews.review_description: I am assigned to write quarterly reviews on management and self-reflection.
reviews.review_pros: Easy UI. Simple. Straight and to the point.
reviews.review_cons: No cons it does a good job. The only Con is they require me to use this for extra work to do. :)

reviews.review_title: Lattice - our go to performance management system
reviews.review_description: Lattice's tool is great, customizable, and enables the business. Lattice also has REALLY STRONG customer service. I'm also a member of Lattice's Resources for Humans community, which is a fantastic asset of all things People Ops best practice sharing. Lattice's annual Resources for Humans virtual event is also TOP NOTCH.
reviews.review_pros: All customizable features: 1:1's Employee engagement surveys Performance reviews 360's eNPS Other customizable surveys
reviews.review_cons: Inability to export data in all areas of the tool (employee engagement surveys, etc)

reviews.review_pros: Everything from selection through implementation has been easy and wonderful
reviews.review_cons: honestly it has been a breeze so far - no large negative feedback

reviews.review_description: It has been great! I have learned a lot by myself, and now we have an account manager which is nice to refer to.
reviews.review_pros: A one-stop shop for all of your employee engagement needs. Once place where everything is recorded.
reviews.review_cons: The goals portion is not working for what we need it to do.

reviews.review_description: Very good, love the user interface and the easy of use.
reviews.review_pros: Very easy to use and streamlines review process.
reviews.review_cons: I feel that since it's accessible only through single sign on it's easy to forget!

reviews.review_description: I have only used Lattice a couple time when giving feedback on colleagues via our Slack integration. Overall, it is a good experience.
reviews.review_pros: I appreciate that our "Praise" channel is integrated within Lattice (or vice versa) - that allows one to document feedback for colleagues and share it with the HR Team while also praising the colleague publicly within the organization.
reviews.review_cons: I would like lattice to be tied to my HR or Benefits which is Rippling

reviews.review_description: Positive experience. Would recommend this tool.
reviews.review_pros: Clean and easy UI/UIX. Reporting Is solid.
reviews.review_cons: Can be glitchy at time. Search ability could be better.

reviews.review_pros: We use lattice for company and individual goal setting. I like that it creates a transparent way to share goals; I can see everyone's goals and they can see mine. This is great to track progress for growth/promotion reasons and it keeps me accountable. This also gives me a view into goals across departments so I gain more insight into the overall business.
reviews.review_cons: My least favourite thing about lattice is the UI itself. I do not always find its pathways clear, and therefore, navigating can be tricky.

reviews.review_description: Lattice is a great tool, but some setting it up can be confusing and you really need managers to see the value in these features and buy in to get high utilization.
reviews.review_pros: For performance management + employee engagement, their features are super helpful. Reviews, Feedback, 1:1s, and Grow offer a lot of great features to identify, record, and improve performance of each employee. All the features tie into one another so it's really comprehensive. The Engagement feature is great for administering surveys to gather feedback + build action plans, which you can do within the platform as well. They also just rolled out AI in their platform which is pretty cool.
reviews.review_cons: Setting up the platform or trying to navigate it is at times confusing and not intuitive - for example, it requires a few extra clicks to get where you want to be, or if you want to change a specific option you may have to upload a spreadsheet instead of there just being a setting, etc. Not the end of the world but like I said can be confusing. It's also pricier than other options out there.

reviews.review_pros: Lattice is very intuitive in it's design of end employee use. When unrolling new products, leaders and employees are able to absorb navigation fairly quickly
reviews.review_cons: There's a lot of features that seem to be built off of specific customization or backend architecture set up that doesn't quite connect seamlessly across platforms. For example, some permissions are easily created for the engagement platform that are not available in the Performance Platform. Or there are Feedback Prompts built into the system, but they are not customizable.

reviews.review_title: Better than nothing with a lot to be desired
reviews.review_pros: Having a central place to manage 1:1s and performance reviews is an improvement to managing those functions in a more ad hoc manner (i.e. in documents, note taking apps, etc.)
reviews.review_cons: 1) The ability to sync action items from 1:1s or goals to other task management applications. Not being able to do so creates duplicate system management issues to have a consolidated to-do list. 2) The ability document ad hoc meetings in addition to recurring 1:1s, using the 1:1 template and functionality. 3) The ability to more easily manage OKRs, including the ability to sort and make bulk updates.

reviews.review_title: Overall, great addition to our company
reviews.review_pros: Lattice has been a great addition to our company. Previously we were using different systems for tracking, survey, and performance reviews. With Lattice we're able to move all of those things into one system. We are also able to do things with Lattice that we didn't do before (ie meeting agendas)!
reviews.review_cons: We'd love to have a group meeting agenda option. There's word of it coming soon, so can't wait!

reviews.review_pros: I love Lattice's customer service the most. Their team of experts really know the product and spend time with you to make sure you become an expert too!
reviews.review_cons: Some things aren't perfect. I wish that you could download a report of everyone who is a manager. Some of the customizations abilities when making your own templates are limited as well so you have to get creative.

reviews.review_pros: Lattice makes performance management and employee engagement easy. It helps managers keep up and stay connected with their employees and it helps keep employees on track.
reviews.review_cons: I wish it integrated with our HRIS system

reviews.review_description: We chose Lattice because of Lattice Goals and the ease of keeping everything about performance in one place. We are very happy users!
reviews.review_pros: Love that everything is in one place. Writing reviews is so easy if employees use all the features on a regular basis: updates, 1:1, goals
reviews.review_cons: There are some suggestions we have given on features- mostly on Lattice Goals. I wish some things could be added piecemeal. Grow is not widely used in our company, but for those that use it, we won't want them to lose it. It's be nice to be able to add it to those that want it.

reviews.review_description: Excellent. This is our 2nd year and we're very pleased.
reviews.review_pros: Ease of use, comprehensive review system, excellent support
reviews.review_cons: Tends to be a bit confusing and sometimes it's not intuitive to drill down to the level we want.
